info.name: Cold Drinks Shop API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Cold Drinks Shop - Full Stack E-Commerce Application.

Base URL: http://localhost:8000

Default Admin Login:
- Email: admin@cooldrinks.com
- Password: admin123

Default Customer Login:
- Email: amit.sharma@gmail.com
- Password: password123

request.description: Register a new customer account. Returns JWT token and user data.
Login as admin. Token is auto-saved to collection variable.
Login as customer. Token is auto-saved to collection variable.
Login using phone number instead of email.
Verify if the current JWT token is valid. Returns user data.
Update logged-in user's profile (name, email, phone, addresses).
Change password for logged-in user. Requires current password.
Reset password using email + phone verification. Last 4 digits of phone must match.
Get all users with order count and total spent. Admin only.
Filter users by role (customer/admin).
Block a user account. Replace USR-002 with actual user ID.
Unblock a blocked user account. Replace USR-002 with actual user ID.
Get all products. No auth required.
Get a single product by ID via query parameter.
Get a single product by ID via URL path.
Filter products by category name.
Search products by name or description.
Filter products by status (active, out_of_stock).
Add a new product. Admin only.
Add a new product via /add route. Admin only.
Update product using ID in body. Admin only.
Update product by ID in URL path. Admin only.
Restock a product. Adds quantity to existing stock. Admin only.
Delete product by ID in URL. Admin only.
Delete product via /delete route. Admin only.
Get all product categories. No auth required.
Create a new category. Admin only.
Update a category. Replace CAT-001 with actual ID. Admin only.
Delete a category. Replace CAT-001 with actual ID. Admin only.
Get orders for logged-in customer.
Get all orders. Admin sees all orders.
Filter orders by customer ID. Admin only.
Filter orders by status (Placed, Confirmed, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled).
Filter orders by payment status (Pending, Paid, Verification Pending, Rejected).
Get single order details by ID. Customer can only view own orders.
Place a new order with Cash on Delivery payment.
Place a new order with Online payment (sets paymentStatus to Verification Pending).
Update order status. Statuses: Placed, Confirmed, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled. Admin only.
Update order status by order ID in path. Admin only.
Approve online payment (change from Verification Pending to Paid). Admin only.
Reject online payment. Admin only.
Cancel an order. Only works if status is Placed or Confirmed. Restores product stock.
Rate a delivered order (1-5 stars). Only works on Delivered orders.
Get the current user's cart.
Add a product to cart or update quantity if already exists.
Replace entire cart with provided items (sync from frontend).
Remove a specific product from cart.
Clear all items from cart.
Get all generated bills. Admin only.
Generate a bill/invoice for an order. Admin only.
Generate a bill for order by ID in path. Admin only.
Download bill as HTML invoice. Can use id or billNumber as query param.
Get dashboard KPIs: total orders, revenue, pending payments, low stock, today's stats.
Get chart data: weekly orders, revenue by category, order status distribution.
Get notifications for the logged-in user. Admin sees all, customer sees their own + broadcast.

body.raw:
{
  "type": "general",
  "title": "Special Offer!",
  "message": "Get 20% off on all soft drinks this weekend!",
  "targetUserId": null,
  "image": ""
}

request.description: Send a notification. Set targetUserId=null for broadcast to all. Admin only.
Send notification to a specific user by ID. Admin only.
Mark a single notification as read by ID in body.
Mark all notifications as read.
Mark a single notification as read via URL path.
Mark all notifications as read via PUT.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment management, outstanding tracking, and clearance requests

request.description: Get payment statistics: total paid, pending, today's collection, monthly, outstanding balances. Admin only.
Get all online payment orders with verification status. Admin only.
Record payment for a specific order. Marks order as Paid and reduces outstanding. Admin only.
Record a generic payment for a customer to reduce their outstanding balance. Admin only.
Get payment history for a specific customer. Admin only.
Get payment summary for logged-in customer: total spent, paid, outstanding, history.
Get all users with outstanding balances. Admin only.
Customer submits a request to clear their outstanding balance.
Get all payment clearance requests. Admin only.
Approve or reject a clearance request. action: 'approve' or 'reject'. Admin only.
Get homepage sliders. Non-admin sees only active sliders.

body.raw:
{
  "image": "https://example.com/slider-banner.jpg",
  "title": "Summer Sale!",
  "subtitle": "Get 30% off on all beverages",
  "link": "/products?category=Soft Drinks",
  "active": true,
  "order": 1
}

request.description: Add a new homepage slider. Admin only.
Update a slider. Replace SLD-001 with actual ID. Admin only.
Delete a slider. Replace SLD-001 with actual ID. Admin only.
Get app settings (theme, colors, etc). No auth required.
Update app settings (deep merge). Admin only.
Get logged-in user's wishlist items.
Toggle product in wishlist (add if not present, remove if already added).
Check if a product is in user's wishlist.
Get coupons. Customers see only active & non-expired. Admin sees all.
Create a new coupon. discountType: 'percentage' or 'flat'. Admin only.
Create a flat discount coupon. Admin only.
Update a coupon. Replace CPN-001 with actual ID. Admin only.
Delete a coupon. Replace CPN-001 with actual ID. Admin only.
Apply a coupon code to calculate discount. Returns discount amount and final price.
Check if the API is running.
